E:\QT\Tools\CMake_64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\UserManagerTests.dir/objects.a
E:\QT\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\UserManagerTests.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\UserManagerTests.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\QT\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\UserManagerTests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o UserManagerTests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libUserManagerTests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\UserManagerTests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
